title: Cole & Mason 605 Salt and Pepper Mill Set, Precision+/Ceramic Mechanisms, Adjustable Salt and Pepper Grinders, Acrylic, 144mm, Cooking/Seasoning, Lifetime Mechanism Guarantee
features: Adjustable Grind: Simply turn the knob on the top of the mill to adjust from coarse to fine

Precision+ and Ceramic Mechanisms: The mill is fitted with an ultra sharp anti-corrosion ceramic grind mechanism whilst the pepper mill is fitted with carbon steel grinding mechanism designed to release more flavour with each turn
Stylish and Durable: With a modern take on a classic design these salt and pepper mills are made from durable acrylic to fit any style of kitchen, café, restaurant or hotel setting

Easy to Clean: To clean, wipe with a damp cloth and use a clean cloth to dry. We recommend you do not use any cleaning products as this can affect the finish of the product. Do not immerse in water or place in a dishwasher.

Lifetime Mechanism Guarantee: These Cole & Mason salt and pepper mills are covered by our lifetime mechanism guarantee. Should your mill not meet the high standards and expectations of Cole & Mason products we will be happy to replace your mill for an alternative of equivalent value. Accidental breakage, poor care and damage from misuse are not covered.
description: From the manufacturer Experts of Seasoning Since 1919 Cole & Mason have been designing and developing kitchenware from the head office in England since 1919. Cole & Mason offer a well-established and intuitively designed range, with a product for every seasoning task, from the kitchen to the table. Whether you need a manual or electronic mill, simple shakers, dry or fresh herb and spice products, pestle and mortar or an oil and vinegar pourer; all products are manufactured with the highest quality materials and available in a wide range of finishes 605 Salt and Pepper Mill Contemporary yet timeless mills Made from durable acrylic, with its squared edges and stainless-steel collar, the acrylic 605 mill has a contemporary yet timeless aesthetic which will elevate any kitchen or dining space. Its sophisticated design and premium quality are synonymous with the Cole & Mason brand. Made from clear durable acrylic and stainless steel Featuring Cole & Mason Precision mechanisms To clean, wipe with a damp cloth and use a clean cloth to dry Precision + Mechanism Technology All our Precision+ mills come equipped with a sharp, corrode resistant ceramic mechanism in the salt mill and our brand new Precision+ mechanism in the pepper mill. Cole & Mason Precision+ mills represent a new level of performance: able to deliver more pepper per turn than ever before and scientifically tested to release more flavour. Adjustable Grind Settings Adjust the grind by tightening or loosening the knob on top. Use a coarse setting for steaks or tomato salad, a medium setting for pizzas and a fine setting for soups and sauces. Easy To Refill Easily refill your mill by simply unscrewing the knob on top and remove along with the acrylic top. Fill up with whole peppercorns and coarse salt, replace the top and continue enjoying freshly ground pepper. Salt should not be placed in the Pepper mill as it will corrode the mechanism. Peace of Mind All Cole & Mason salt and Pepper mill mechanisms are covered for their lifetime. Should your mill not meet the high standards and expectations of Cole & Mason products we will be happy to replace your mill for an alternative of equivalent value. Accidental breakage, poor care and damage from misuse are not covered. Durable, hard-wearing and elegantly simple The ideal salt and Pepper mills for every household where the kitchen is the heart of the home. Perfectly seasoned and tasty food doesn't always need to be fancy and neither do the mills that provide the seasoning. Simple, stylish and serving their purpose exactly; keep them next to the oven within easy reach whilst cooking, or in the centre of the table during family meal times. 605 675 505 Flip 180 105 Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 2,063 4.4 out of 5 stars 74 4.3 out of 5 stars 2,063 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,847 4.4 out of 5 stars 250 Price £24.99 £ 24 . 99 £19.99 £ 19 . 99 £24.30 £ 24 . 30 £24.00 £ 24 . 00 £32.29 £ 32 . 29 Product Code H233074 H233077 H50518P H581780 H10538P Material Acrylic Acrylic Acrylic Acrylic Acrylic/Wood Size 144mm 118mm 140mm 154mm 165mm Grind Mechanism Precision+ Precision+ Precision+ Ceramic Precision+
